title: Yijing Hexagram 44: Gou (Coming to Meet)
description: Hexagram 44 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 44 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Coming to Meet. The maiden is powerful. One should not marry such a maiden.
